REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEFENDANTS FRANK NOLAN, ANDREW WARREN AND VANGUARD PROPERTIES, INC.'S DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED IN PART AND OVERRULED IN PART. DEMURRER TO CAUSE OF ACTION FOR BREACH OF CONTRACT IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND FOR PLAITNIFF TO ALLEGE A CONTRACT WITH DEFENDANT, TO ATTACHED THE CONTRACT, AND TO ALLEGE WHICH CONTRACTUAL PROVISION WAS BREACHED. DEMURRER IS OTHERWISE OVERRULED. THIS ACTION BY BUYER AGAINST DUAL AGENT IS NOT BARRED BY CC 2079. LYON V. SUP. CT. (2012) 204 CAL.APP.4TH 1294. CAUSE OF ACTION FOR FRAUDULENT CONCEALMENT IS ALLEGED WITH REQUISITE SPECIFICITY. CAUSES OF ACTION FOR NEGLIGENCE, VIOLATION OF 1102 AND BREACH OF FIDUCIARY DUTY SUFFICIENTLY ALLEGED. WHILE THESE CAUSES OF ACTION ARE IN PART BASED OF FAILURE TO INVESTIGATE (FOR WHICH PLAINTIFF HAS NOT AUTHORITY), IT IS ALSO BASED ON FAILURE TO ALLEGE A KNOWN FACT. DEFENDANTS FAIL TO CITE ANY AUTHORITY FOR THE PROPOSITION THAT AGENT/BROKER FOR PURCHASER HAS NO DUTY TO DISCLOSE A KNOWN FACT THAT IMPACTS THE DESIRABILITY OR PRICE OF THE PROPERTY. PLAINTIFF REQUEST 20 DAYS FROM NOTICE OF ENTRY OF ORDER TO FILED THE AMENDED COMPLAINT. THE DEFENDANT DOES NOT OBJECT. THE COURT GRANTS THE PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST. PLAINTIFF SHALL HAVE 20 DAYS FROM NOITCE OF ENTRY OF ORDER TO FILE THE AMENDED COMPLAINT. MOVING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312(B). JUDGE: RONALD E. QUIDACHAY; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (501)

DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-18-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Mark Wilson, 415.400.0829 for Defendants/Moving party Vanguard Propetird, Inc, Frank Nolan and Andrew Warren.
John Brockmeier, 310.425.3431 (via Court call) for Plaintiffs/Opposing parties Zachary Bookman.

Argued by the Defendant. Plaintiff submitts. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANTs FRANK NOLAN, ANDREW WARREN and VANGUARD PROPERTIES, INC.'s DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT is sustained in part and overruled in part. Demurrer to cause of action for breach of contract is sustained with leave to amend for Plaitniff to allege a contract with Defendant, to attached the contract, and to allege which contractual provision was breached. Demurrer is otherwise overruled. This action by buyer against dual agent is not barred by CC 2079. Lyon v. Sup. Ct. (2012) 204 Cal.App.4th 1294. Cause of action for fraudulent concealment is alleged with requisite specificity. Causes of action for negligence, violation of 1102 and breach of fiduciary duty sufficiently alleged. While these causes of action are in part based of failure to investigate (for which Plaintiff has not authority), it is also based on failure to allege a known fact. Defendants fail to cite any authority for the proposition that agent/broker for purchaser has no duty to disclose a known fact that impacts the desirability or price of the property. Plaintiff request 20 days from notice of entry of order to filed the amended complaint. The Defendant does not object. The Court grants the Plaintiff's request. Plaintiff shall have 20 days from noitce of entry of order to file the amended complaint. Moving party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)
